content:
# United Arab Emirates

**Summary**: The United Arab Emirates, a country in the Middle East.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1992-el-sahn|El-Sahn, 1992]] studied the Jabal Hafeet section located in the UAE.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[1992-el-sahn|El-Sahn, 1992]] Oman Mountains foredeep

## Formations Present

- [[1992-el-sahn|El-Sahn, 1992]] Dammam, Rus, Umm Al-Radhuma

## Key Findings From This Location

- Jabal Hafeet is the only known locality in Arabia with fossiliferous, marine, Late Eocene-Early Oligocene outcrops. ([[1992-el-sahn|El-Sahn, 1992, p. 13]])
